grades.expectation: Response mentions regularisation as an option (retrospective local authority approval)
grades.reason: Clearly explains regularisation process including seller applying for retrospective building regulations approval

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as an alternative
grades.reason: Discusses indemnity insurance as remedy option with detailed pros/cons

grades.expectation: Response states indemnity insurance must be obtained BEFORE any approach to the local authority
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'If anyone has already contacted building control, indemnity is no longer available' and warns about timing

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part B (fire safety) as a key concern for loft conversions
grades.reason: Specifically identifies 'Part B - fire safety' as main concern and states lenders treat fire safety strictly

grades.expectation: Response provides approximate costs for at least one option (regularisation £400-800 or insurance £50-200)
grades.reason: No cost figures provided for either regularisation or indemnity insurance options
